mapper.select: select id, task_id, trace_id, document_id, config_id, result_json, confidence_json, overall_confidence, need_review, status, field_count, target_table, mapping_profile, created_at, updated_at from extract_result_record where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: update extract_result_record set result_json = #{resultJson}, confidence_json = #{confidenceJson}, overall_confidence = #{overallConfidence}, need_review = #{needReview}, status = #{status}, field_count = #{fieldCount}, target_table = #{targetTable}, mapping_profile = #{mappingProfile}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where task_id = #{taskId}
